final:
module register(
	input clk,
	input reset,
	input enable,
	input [7:0] data,
	output reg [7:0] q);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset)
        q <= 8'b00000000;
    else if (enable)
        q <= data;
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~data;
    end
  end

endmodule
